common.motto: Find your partner. Build your future. Grow together.
common.comingSoonBody: This part of your journey is being crafted with the same care as the rest. It arrives in an upcoming release.

trust.valuesCaption: Guided by faith, built on trust
trust.marriageCaption: Designed for a purpose that truly matters

validation.displayName: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.minAge: You must be at least {{minAge}} years old.

gate.title: Verify your identity to continue
gate.body: Matching, interests, and communication unlock once your identity is verified — this keeps the community safe and serious. The verification flow arrives in an upcoming release.

home.subtitle: A calm, considered space to find a compatible partner — and to prepare for a marriage that lasts.

journey.title: Every step toward marriage, in one place
journey.subtitle: You're just getting started. Here's the path ahead — you move at your own pace.
journey.nextDetail: Verify your identity to unlock private, compatibility-based matching.

match.title: Your matches, curated
match.body: Compatibility-ranked introductions — never endless browsing. Your first recommendations arrive after verification.

assistant.title: Marriage Assistant
assistant.body: From preparing for marriage to a respectful first conversation — thoughtful guidance whenever you need it.

finance.title: Build your future together
finance.body: Plan a wedding budget and shared goals — tools that keep working long after the wedding day.

match.title: Match
match.subtitle: Meaningful, AI-curated recommendations for serious marriage.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Build a healthy financial future together.

assistant.title: Marriage Assistant
assistant.subtitle: A respectful assistant for your whole marriage journey.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: The next important step — never noise.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your marriage profile, privacy, and verification.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Operate the platform without touching code.

guardian.title: Guardian Review
guardian.subtitle: Only the introductions explicitly shared with you.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your marriage journey.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: A serious, privacy-first platform for marriage.
register.genderNote: Gender is set at registration and locked after identity verification.
register.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a secure reset link.
forgot.sent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.

authCallback.title: Finishing sign-in…
authCallback.body: If this doesn't continue automatically, return to sign in.

phone.title: Phone verification
phone.subtitle: Verify your phone number to strengthen your account's trust.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
